title: Trends in the US data centre market
author: Shan Tomouk, BESS & Energy Lead, Benchmark; Bryan Bille, Lead Policy and Geopolitical Analyst, Benchmark; Matthew Bird,
text: Jul 16, 2026 | 09:01Trends in the US data centre marketAnalyst InsightsData centresShan Tomouk, BESS & Energy Lead, Benchmark; Bryan Bille, Lead Policy and Geopolitical Analyst, Benchmark; Matthew Bird, Senior Editor, BenchmarkBenchmark analysts Shan Tomouk and Bryan Bille discuss trends in the US data centre market with Senior Editor Matthew Bird.00:00Jun 23, 2026Real estate and US reindustrialisation: Interview with Savills’ Ken BiberajUS reindustrialisation depends not just on policy, but on the availability of land, power and permitting. Bryan Bille speaks with Savills’ Ken Biberaj about the real estate constraints shaping critical minerals and manufacturing projects, and why industrial policy must connect federal ambition with local execution.00:00Jun 17, 2026US energy storage policy and manufacturing: Interview with LG Energy Solution’s Bob LeeAs US energy storage demand accelerates, manufacturing flexibility is becoming a competitive advantage. In this interview, Iola Hughes speaks with LG Energy Solution’s Bob Lee about shifting capacity to LFP, serving utility-scale storage and the policy certainty needed to unlock further domestic investment.00:00Jun 16, 2026Key takeaways from Giga US 2026: Interview with Benchmark CEO Andrew MillerBenchmark CEO Andrew Miller discussed his key takeaways from the Giga US 2026 conference in Washington, DC.00:00Jun 12, 2026Panel: Driving Demand: What’s Powering the Next Phase of the U.S. EV Market?This panel unpacks how policy, pricing pressures, and shifting consumer behaviour are shaping the next wave of EV adoption.00:00Jun 12, 2026 Critical minerals in Defense Tech: The Hidden Backbone of Military PowerAssessing the US critical minerals stockpile and its role in stabilizing volatile Western prices, & the role of the government in price exchanges00:00Jun 12, 2026Fireside Chat: Managing Critical Shifts in EV, ESS & Defence Demand00:00Jun 12, 2026 Panel: Powering the Surge: Energy Storage at the Center of America’s Grid TransformationFrom exponential demand to supply chain sovereignty, energy storage is becoming the backbone—and bottleneck—of the U.S. energy transition.00:00Jun 12, 2026 Keynote Data Presentation: ESS - Stabilising the grid in the age of AI and Data CentersPresenting the report findings from SEIA & Benchmark’s proprietary grid and behind the meter data on US energy storage deployment
